specs.title: App shell mounts and is visible
WebSocket status shows connected
Current price displays live data
Risk panel renders with data
Signal panel renders with signals
Market ticker panel is visible with asset tabs
Session phase pipeline is visible
Health bar is visible with status indicators
Last tick timestamp is displayed
Clock displays a time string
Account selector is visible and shows an account ID
Account selector opens dropdown on click
TRADING badge is visible
All 4 status dots are visible within health-bar
Last tick timestamp has text content
All 10 asset tabs are visible
Each asset tab displays a price with digits
Clicking an asset tab updates the chart header asset name
MES tab price contains formatted number
CAPITAL value is a formatted dollar amount
EQUITY value is a formatted dollar amount
Cumulative P&L displays with sign
MAX DD bar renders 10 segments
MAX DD percentage is displayed
DAILY DD bar renders 10 segments
DAILY DD percentage is displayed
Payout target progress bar is visible
Payout remaining amount is displayed
Day P&L has a value
Profit Factor has a value
Day Stats: Wins, Losses, Trades, Win% all have values
Risk Parameters: Max DD, Daily DD, Max Lots values are displayed
Accounts section shows at least one account with ACTIVE/INACTIVE badge
Selected asset symbol is displayed in chart header
Last price is displayed (not dash)
Price change and percentage are displayed
Volume is displayed
Bid/Ask spread is displayed
OR Upper and OR Lower values are displayed
OR state badge shows a valid state string
Component renders (either position or empty state)
Shows 'No active position' when no positions exist (mock mode)
Pipeline stage pills are visible
Exactly one pill is highlighted as active
EXECUTED stage is active in mock mode
Auto Trade toggle is visible and clickable
Clicking Auto Trade toggle changes its state
Signal cards are visible with direction, asset, prices, P&L, tier
Session summary footer shows P&L, Win%, Signals, Trades
Mock data has at least 5 signal cards
TRADE LOG header is visible
Column headers (TIME, TICK, D, P&L, DUR) are visible
Total footer shows trade count
Shows 'No trades today' when no positions (mock mode)
SYSTEM LOG header is visible
Filter buttons (All, Errors, Signals, Orders) are visible
Log entries display timestamp and message text
Clicking Errors filter shows only error entries
Clicking Signals filter shows only signal entries
Clicking Orders filter shows only order entries
Clicking All filter after another restores full list
Day P&L in RiskPanel matches session footer P&L in SignalCards
Trade count in RiskPanel matches TradeLog footer
Pipeline stage in SignalExecutionBar matches mock data
No uncaught JavaScript errors in console
No React key warnings or prop type warnings
Click different asset in MarketTicker → chart header updates
Click Auto Trade toggle → toggle state visually changes
Click SystemLog filter buttons → log entries filter correctly
Click account selector → dropdown opens → click account → updates
All four stage pills render with correct labels
Exactly one pill is active at any time
Mock mode starts with EXECUTED active
Stage pills cycle through all stages via store changes
Store default is WAITING before mock injection overrides it
Pipeline stage from dashboard snapshot is respected
Rapid stage transitions settle on final state
